2604.20313.title: Formalising the Logit Shift Induced by LoRA: A Technical Note
2604.20313.paper_summary: This technical note provides a first-order formalisation of the logit shift and fact-margin change induced by Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Using a first-order Fréchet approximation around the base model trajectory, we show that the multi-layer LoRA effect can be decomposed into a linear summation of layerwise contributions and a higher-order remainder term representing inter-layer coupling.
2604.20313.paper_summary_zh: 這份技術備忘錄提供了由低秩適應（LoRA）引起的邏輯轉移和事實邊際變化的一階形式化。<lb/>通過在基礎模型軌跡周圍使用一階Fréchet近似，我們展示了多層LoRA效應可以分解為層級貢獻的線性總和以及代表層間耦合的高階餘項。
2604.20313.author: Xiang Shi et.al.
2604.20313.authors: Xiang Shi, Shuaizhi Cheng, Mingwei Li
